description: Composition Black tennis skirt made of 87% polyester and 13% spandex, has inbuilt shorts, white panels on both sides, broad elasticated waistband and slits on both sides with nike swoosh embroidered on the left hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash cold at 30 degrees with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Cool iron; do not iron on decorations Stylish to a T, this tennis skirt from nike is designed with Dri-Fit technology to keep you fresh and comfortable while you sweat it out on the court. The broad waistband sits snugly, offering a comfort fit. Team it with Nike tennis tees and shoes for that smart, sporty look.
